ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "job_type" INTEGER /* ID of the job type */,
  "urgency" INTEGER /* ID of the urgency level */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the job (e.g., COMPLETED) */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine assigned to the job */,
  "arrival_time" REAL /* Time when the job arrived in the system */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Execution time of the job on each machine */,
  "energy_usage" REAL /* Total energy usage of the job */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Time when the job started execution */,
  "completion_time" REAL /* Time when the job was completed */,
  "missed_time" REAL /* Time by which the job missed its deadline */,
  "deadline" REAL /* Deadline for the job */,
  "extended_deadline" REAL /* Extended deadline for the job */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the job */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the job */,
  "resource_requirements" TEXT /* Resource requirements for the job */,
  "estimated_duration" REAL /* Estimated duration of the job */,
  "actual_energy_usage" REAL /* Actual energy usage after job completion */,
  "missed_deadline_reason" TEXT /* Reason for missing the deadline */,
  "retries" INTEGER /* Number of retries for the job */,
  "last_retry_time" REAL /* Time of the last retry */,
  "error_log" TEXT /* Error logs related to the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_urgency FOREIGN KEY ("urgency") REFERENCES urgency_levels ("urgency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_job_type FOREIGN KEY ("job_type") REFERENCES job_types ("job_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "machine_type" TEXT /* Type of machine (e.g., cpu, gpu) */,
  "machine_status" TEXT /* Current status of the machine (e.g., available, busy) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the machine */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the machine */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the machine */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  "utilization_rate" REAL /* Current utilization rate of the machine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_types" (
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "job_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the job type (e.g., TT1, TT2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job type */,
  "default_priority" TEXT /* Default priority for jobs of this type */,
  "default_resource_requirements" TEXT /* Default resource requirements for jobs of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urgency_levels" (
  "urgency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urgency level */,
  "urgency_name" TEXT /* Name of the urgency level (e.g., BESTEFFORT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the urgency level */,
  "default_priority_level" TEXT /* Default priority level for urgency levels */,
  "default_extended_deadline_factor" REAL /* Factor by which the extended deadline is calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("urgency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, user, developer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "last_logout_time" TEXT /* Last logout time of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_execution" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job execution */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being executed */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine executing the job */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Time when the job started execution */,
  "completion_time" REAL /* Time when the job was completed */,
  "actual_start_time" REAL /* Actual start time of the job execution */,
  "actual_completion_time" REAL /* Actual completion time of the job execution */,
  "energy_consumed" REAL /* Energy consumed during the job execution */,
  "resource_utilization" TEXT /* Resource utilization during the job execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_execution_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_execution_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)
